neonDreams.enabledNeedsExtension: ✨ Neon Dreams configured! Install the "Custom CSS and JS Loader" extension to apply the effect.
neonDreams.enabledNeedsReload: ✨ Neon Dreams enabled! Run "Reload Custom CSS and JS" to apply the changes.
neonDreams.disabledNoExtension: 🌙 Neon Dreams disabled in settings. Note: the "Custom CSS and JS Loader" extension is not installed.
neonDreams.disabledNeedsReload: 🌙 Neon Dreams disabled. Run "Reload Custom CSS and JS" to apply the changes.
